name: lambda
context: AWS Lambda serverless functions — create, deploy, invoke, and manage
info: Full Lambda lifecycle: create functions from zip or container, configure triggers (API Gateway, S3, SQS, EventBridge), manage layers, set environment variables, configure VPC access, and monitor with CloudWatch.

scripts.name: Deploy Function
scripts.description: Package and deploy a Lambda function
scripts.inline:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd "$FUNCTION_DIR"
zip -r /tmp/function.zip .
aws lambda update-function-code \
  --function-name "$FUNCTION_NAME" \
  --zip-file fileb:///tmp/function.zip \
  --region "${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"

scripts.name: Invoke Function
scripts.description: Invoke a Lambda function with a payload

author: dojo-community
